suite.name: Epic3 Validation Tests

kw.name: Suite Init
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Run seed script and load test data IDs

test.name: TC-3.15 Low Rating Without Tags - Submit Disabled

kw.name: Test Init
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3001/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Create API session for each test

kw.name: Login As Passenger
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Login as passenger once and reuse session

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.arg: // Find star rating buttons by multiple criteria
// Look for buttons with star-related attributes or classes
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.msg: Show 2nd star selected with enhanced JavaScript
kw.arg: Show 2nd star selected with enhanced JavaScript
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ส่งรีวิว') or contains(text(),'Submit')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Element Attribute
kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.arg: Submit button should be disabled for low rating without tags
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: ✅ Submit button is disabled as expected
kw.arg: ✅ Submit button is disabled as expected
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Test Cleanup
Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Clean up after each test

test.doc: Rating 1-3 stars without tags should disable submit button

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'กรุณาแสดงความคิดเห็นเพิ่มเติมอย่างน้อย 10 ตัวอักษร' but did not.
kw.arg: กรุณาแสดงความคิดเห็นเพิ่มเติมอย่างน้อย 10 ตัวอักษร
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'กรุณาแสดงความคิดเห็นเพิ่มเติมอย่างน้อย 10 ตัวอักษร' but did not.

kw.arg: กรุณาแสดงความคิดเห็นเพิ่มเติมอย่างน้อย 10 ตัวอักษร
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Thai error message shown for short comment
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'comment must be at least' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'comment must be at least' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ English error message shown for short comment
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Returns the value of ``attribute`` from the element ``locator``.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Rating 1-2 stars with negative tags requires minimum comment length

test.name: TC-3.17 High Rating Hides Negative Tags

Create Session

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ขับรถเร็ว') or contains(text(),'reckless') or contains(text(),'late_arrival') or contains(text(),'rude')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Negative tags should not be visible for 5-star rating
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Negative tags hidden for high rating
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(text(),'สุภาพ') or contains(text(),'polite') or contains(text(),'ขับปลอดภัย') or contains(text(),'safe') or contains(text(),'on_time') or contains(text(),'friendly')]
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Positive tags should be visible for 5-star rating
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: ✅ Positive tags shown for high rating (${positive_count} tags found)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects
Clean up after each test

test.doc: Rating 4-5 stars should not show negative tags

test.name: TC-3.18 Anonymous Review Creation
test.doc: Create review with anonymous option enabled
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-3.19 Review Immutability - No Edit/Delete
test.doc: Submitted reviews should be read-only with no edit/delete buttons
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

test.name: TC-3.20 Driver Dispute Creation UI
test.doc: Driver can create dispute through UI with success notification
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.msg: Retrying (Retry(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=56924): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/125c83905daffb3436e0ca5171622485

Retrying (Retry(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='localhost', port=56924): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10061] No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it")': /session/125c83905daffb3436e0ca5171622485

kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: Epic 3 Review System Validation Tests - Edge Cases and UI Validation
